name: Mikhail Ivanovich Petrov
alt_names: ミハイル・イワーノヴィチ・ペドロフ
description:
Nationality: German (formerly), Russian

Formely known as Reinhard Biermann. Having been part of the inner circle of the Kinderheim 511 experiments, he tried to recreate their experiments by bringing up the Czech orphan children in the opposite way the 511 children were brought up.
